maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.
notes: 2026-06-28 run: Tasks 2+3. Task 2: no new user issues, #24 has no new activity. Task 3: created PRs from existing branches for #79 (tint glow) and #82 (perf+tests). All planned Future Work items from monthly summary are now submitted as real PRs. Next run: look for new bugs in codebase or investigate HDR support (#24) further if there's user activity.
